nasb.text: For seven days you shall eat unleavened bread, and on the seventh day there shall be a feast to the Lord.

esv.text: Seven days you shall eat unleavened bread, and on the seventh day there shall be a feast to the Lord.

cnv.text: 你要吃無酵餅七日，第七日要向耶和華守節。

ccb.text: 在节期的七天之内，你们只可以吃无酵饼，到了第七天，你们要为耶和华守节期。
